negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: av_2d2c3c3b-0a9e-4220-b280-1167e1bc7edf
prompt: The video opens with a view from inside an ego vehicle, capturing the scene through a dashboard camera as it approaches an urban intersection. The vehicle starts at a moderate speed, gradually accelerating as it nears the stop sign. The intersection is marked with a prominent hexagonal red all-way stop sign on a pole to the left, accompanied by a pedestrian crossing with white stripes. Several pedestrians are seen walking, standing, or crossing the street; notably, one person in a pink jacket walks across the crosswalk. To the right, a building with a red facade advertises "HI-Life BBQ" and "Special Lunch," with a white van parked nearby. The surrounding area includes parked cars, utility poles with overhead wires, and a mix of modern and older-style buildings in the background. The atmosphere is calm and typical of a small town or suburban setting, with clear blue skies and sunlight casting shadows on the ground.  As the video progresses, the white car on the right remains largely static, with minimal changes in the positions of the pedestrians and vehicles. A gray SUV enters the frame from the right side, adding slight movement to the scene. The individuals using the crosswalk continue their movement, while others stand near the "HI-Life BBQ" establishment. The white van parked next to the restaurant remains stationary throughout the sequence. The environment, including the clear blue sky and the urban backdrop, stays consistent, emphasizing the tranquil and uneventful nature of the moment. By the end of the video, the scene continues to depict the same intersection with two vehicles moving, maintaining the calm and typical urban setting.
